title: galeopsis ladanum
intro: Galeopsis ladanum, also known as ladys mantle or gypsy weed, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of galeopsis ladanum include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of galeopsis ladanum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
